_comment: Bevel all 4 edges incident to the +Z tip of an octahedron (selCount=4 valence=4 at tip; selCount=1 valence=4 at the 4 equator endpoints). Two known gaps: (1) the tip cap uses 4 BoundVerts but isCubeCornerLike requires exactly 3 — falls through to generic adj_vmesh; (2) at equator vertices the offsetMeet at selCount=1 valence=4 lands BVs on non-bev support directions but Blender slides them along the OPPOSITE-tip direction. Closing this needs the cube-corner cap algorithm generalized to n_bndv=4 (which Blender's adj_vmesh handles via cubic_subdiv — same code we ported, but with n=4 instead of 3 throughout).
